_note: v0.3 Item 7: bind:this on member expressions (`refs.count` / `arr[i]`) was previously dropped at analyze — now emits a never-called lambda assigning `HTMLElementTagNameMap['tag']` to the target. The TokenMapEntry pass maps the overlay EXPR span back to the user's bind:this={expr} source range, so TS2322 surfaces at the expression position. Cross-HTMLElement type distinctions don't fire (structural compatibility via the HTMLElement base); TRULY-wrong targets like `number` do.
